Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Benson's steel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Benson's steel is a resource used by Simon that can be depleted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Simon used Benson's liquid steel to power his legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Benson's steel flows through Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Benson's steel protected Simon from the impact against the wall.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Indirial is powered by Benson's steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Benson’s steel is something Kai holds to protect his throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Simon can release Benson's steel.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Benson's steel is one of the powers Simon held when he first met Valin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Benson's steel is something Simon uses to brace himself against walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Benson's steel flows through the veins like an icy river.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Simon can push with Benson's steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Benson's steel is something Indirial can summon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Kai uses Benson's steel.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
